video_details.title: The Art of Betting Big | Elite Traders Lance Breitstein & Kyle Williams on When to Size Up
video_details.description:
In this video, I interview 7-figure Trader Kyle Williams, as we go in depth on the topic of Trade Sizing. With a game like Poker, if you bet the same amount on every hand, statistically speaking, you should lose over time as there are more bad hands than good ones. However, if you up the ante during your best hands, your chances of being positive in the long run increase. It’s my belief that this same concept applies to trading, as the best traders make most of their profits from a small fraction of their trades, as they are the best at recognizing when to scale up. In this video, Kyle and I talk about all things trade sizing, from how much to start with, how to scale up, and how to handle the mental roadblocks that come with it.

👉 Follow Kyle's YouTube Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@kylewilliams3752

If you’re new to my channel, my name is Lance Breitstein. I spent over a decade trading equities at Trillium, setting the record for highest PNL in a single year as their Top Trader. I trained dozens of traders to become successes while managing Trillium’s Chicago office. With over $100m in verified profits, I now spend my time focused on turning good traders into greats and greats into GOATs. Advisor to SMB Capital and mentor of 7- and 8-figure PER YEAR traders. I am to be profiled in the next edition of Jack Schwager’s Market Wizards.

The journey is never easy. Trading is one of the most difficult, but most rewarding jobs imaginable. I am here to help you on your path, wherever that leads you.

May you want it bad enough to overcome any obstacles.
-(The One) Lance B
